message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

participant "Main" as Main
participant "creatFile" as creatFile
participant "createJava" as createJava
participant "createCSS" as createCSS

Main -> creatFile : 1 call function
Main -[dotted]->> createJava : 2 callfunction
Main -[dotted]->> createCSS : 3 callfunction
creatFile -[dotted]->> Main : 4 new file created
createCSS -[dotted]->> Main : 5 new file created
createJava -[dotted]->> Main : 6 new file created

@enduml
```
